title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Transfer Build
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an ordered service-record processor with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, update, search, append, extend, insert, remove, and clear lists with explicit mutation intent.
Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.
Distinguish aliasing, shallow copy, nested mutable sharing, and deliberate independent copies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any
